directives.title: Build Neon DB contact export script
directives.task: Create a Python script at tools/contact-verifier/export_contacts_from_db.py that connects to the Neon PostgreSQL database and exports all 231 W251 contacts to contacts.csv. Use DATABASE_URL env var. CSV columns: first_name, last_name, full_name, company, company_domain, title, priority, category, rfq_status, email. Priority: ACTIVE_RFQ for Baker Hughes contacts, TIER1 for Tier 1 suppliers, NORMAL for others.
directives.context: Neon PostgreSQL. DATABASE_URL in .env. Contact verifier at tools/contact-verifier/contact_verifier.py expects this CSV format.

directives.title: Generate RFQ drafts for remaining 6 W251 priority contacts
directives.task: Create a Python script at tools/rfq-generator/generate_rfqs.py that generates personalized RFQ emails for 6 contacts: Tod Carpenter (Donaldson CEO, Inlet Air Filtering $480K), Bob Yeager (Emerson President, Fuel Gas $374K), Rod Christie (Baker Hughes EVP Turbomachinery), Michael Wynblatt (Donaldson CTO), Harrison K (Amerex, Fire Fighting), Neil Ashford (Turbotect, Compressor Washing). Save each as tools/rfq-generator/drafts/rfq_FIRSTNAME_COMPANY.txt. Each RFQ: professional, C-suite, under 300 words, references W251B8 power island Santa Teresa NM Project Jupiter.
directives.context: Baker Hughes RFQ already drafted. These are the next 6. BOP total $9.274M. TWP is program manager for EthosEnergy W251B8 at Oracle/OpenAI campus.

directives.title: Build pricing verification status tracker and executive dashboard
directives.task: Create tools/pricing-discovery/track_verification_status.py that reads pricing_updated.csv and produces: (1) verification_status_report.md showing ESTIMATED vs VERIFIED by category, total $ at risk, RFQ send priority by $ impact, (2) pricing_dashboard.txt with one-page executive program summary. All 19 categories currently ESTIMATED. Baker Hughes response upgrades VIB_MON to VERIFIED.
directives.context: Input: tools/pricing-discovery/outputs/pricing_updated.csv. Total BOP mid $9.274M. Trillium AVOID on PIPING_VALVES ($507K). 8 STRATEGIC tier categories above $500K.

directives.title: Generate W251 program intelligence master report
directives.task: Create tools/reports/w251_program_status.md — a comprehensive boardroom-ready executive brief covering: BOP procurement status (19 categories), supplier network (73 suppliers, tier distribution), contact pipeline (231 contacts, RFQ readiness), active RFQs (Baker Hughes + 6 remaining), risk register (Trillium AVOID, pricing unverified, contact gap), recommended 30-day actions. CFO/CPO level. Read all available data from tools/pricing-discovery/outputs/ and tools/contact-verifier/outputs/.
directives.context: Project Jupiter. 50MW W251B8. Oracle/OpenAI campus Santa Teresa NM. TWP program manager. EthosEnergy GT supplier. Buchanan & Associates executive search context.
